attack_chain.description: Attackers prepared a fraudulent legal order document to impersonate law enforcement and target Kodex's domain registrar (AWS).
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the registrar who improperly froze our domain as a result of the fraudulent legal order

evidence_chunks.quote: the registrar who improperly froze our domain as a result of the fraudulent legal order
the registrar who improperly froze our domain as a result of the fraudulent legal order

attack_chain.description: Attackers socially engineered AWS (Kodex's domain registrar) by submitting a fraudulent legal order, exploiting the trust relationship between Kodex and its registrar.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: attackers socially engineered AWS into freezing its domain

evidence_chunks.quote: attackers socially engineered AWS into freezing its domain
attackers socially engineered AWS into freezing its domain

attack_chain.description: Attackers attempted to transfer the Kodex domain to a different registrar based on the fraudulent order, though ownership was never actually transferred.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: attackers attempted to transfer the domain to a different registrar

evidence_chunks.quote: attackers attempted to transfer the domain to a different registrar
attackers attempted to transfer the domain to a different registrar

attack_chain.description: AWS improperly froze the Kodex domain in response to the fraudulent order, causing the website, portal, API, and some email services to be unavailable from 08:54-12:47 EDT.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: website, portal, API, and some email services were rendered unavailable on October 1 between 08:54-12:47 EDT

evidence_chunks.quote: website, portal, API, and some email services were rendered unavailable on October 1 between 08:54-12:47 EDT
website, portal, API, and some email services were rendered unavailable on October 1 between 08:54-12:47 EDT

initial_access_vector: Social engineering of AWS (as domain registrar) via a fraudulent legal order requesting domain transfer
persistence_mechanism: None - ownership was never actually transferred; registrar froze domain but attackers did not maintain access
privilege_escalation: None observed - attackers did not compromise Kodex credentials or systems
